locator.quote: they should never have opened it

text: E3's operating principle: if they can't close it, they should never have opened it — refuse opens whose close path is too expensive.

locator.quote: first probe to clearly move the metrics

text: E3 (close_feasibility_max_spread_pct=0.05) was the first probe to clearly move the metrics across ~12 probes.
E3 mechanism: refusing expensive-to-close opens makes remaining ones mature more reliably (mr 0.34→0.50), fc cost drops 35%, locked floor climbs; probe pnl +£59.4/d vs −£46.

locator.quote: 5/5 agents profitable on BOTH fc=0 AND fc=120.

text: E3 full cohort held-out: 5/5 agents profitable on BOTH fc=0 AND fc=120; top-5 mean +£55.4/d fc=120.

locator.quote: side / naked-side add-on tested has net-subtracted.

text: After 19 probes, E3 alone is the local optimum at probe scale: every close-side / naked-side add-on tested has net-subtracted.
